item.title: Avanos Medical, Inc.: Product Name: MIC Safety Percutaneous Endoscopic Gastrostomy PEG Kit with ENFit Connectors 20 Fr PUSH OTW Model/Catalog Number: 8170-20 Recall
item.product: Product Name: MIC Safety Percutaneous Endoscopic Gastrostomy PEG Kit with ENFit Connectors 20 Fr PUSH OTW Model/Catalog Number: 8170-20
item.summary: Lidocaine hydrochloride injection, the subject of a supplier recall for quality issues, were included into sterile kits and sets. Product details: Product Name: MIC Safety Percutaneous Endoscopic Gastrostomy PEG Kit with ENFit Connectors 20 Fr PUSH OTW Model/Catalog Number: 8170-20
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
